task_completion.description: Log into the OpenMRS system using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the OpenMRS login screen with username 'superman' and password 'Admin123', or the OpenMRS authenticated dashboard indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the provider management or 'Add Provider' section in OpenMRS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the OpenMRS Administration page, specifically the 'Manage Providers' or 'Add Provider' form interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the provider's name as 'Kenji Tanaka'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Kenji' entered into the given/first name field and 'Tanaka' entered into the family/last name field on the provider creation form.
Screenshots showing 'DOC-2024-0047' entered into the 'Identifier' or 'Provider Identifier' field on the form.

task_completion.description: Save the new provider and ensure the account is marked as active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a success message for the saved provider, or the provider details page displaying 'Kenji Tanaka', identifier 'DOC-2024-0047', and an indicator that the provider is 'Active' (e.g., no 'Retired' flag, or an explicit 'Active' status).

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenMRS GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible navigating to https://localhost/openmrs, rather than using terminal commands like curl to interact with the API.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running MySQL/PostgreSQL commands or scripts to directly insert the provider record into the database.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual OpenMRS interface and styling, not a text editor, notes app, or a locally mocked HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a provider in OpenMRS (https://localhost/openmrs) using credentials 'superman' / 'Admin123'. The provider's name must be 'Kenji Tanaka' (Given name: 'Kenji', Family name: 'Tanaka') and the identifier must be exactly 'DOC-2024-0047'. The final state must show the provider is successfully saved and active.
